efficacyPairs.questionText: A school hall has 23 rows of chairs with 14 chairs in each row. How many chairs are there altogether?
A farmer plants 46 rows of apple trees with 27 trees in each row. How many apple trees does he plant?
A box contains 36 chocolates. How many chocolates are in 15 boxes?
A sweet shop orders 58 jars of sweets, with 32 sweets in each jar. How many sweets are ordered in total?
A factory produces 125 toys every hour. How many toys are made in 24 hours?
A school trip costs £37 per student. If 28 students go, what is the total cost?
A gardener plants 74 seeds in each flowerbed. If there are 19 flowerbeds, how many seeds are planted altogether?
A school kitchen uses 235 millilitres of milk per pupil at breakfast. How many millilitres are needed for 16 pupils?
A cinema ticket costs £12. How much do 45 tickets cost?
A PE teacher orders 89 tennis balls for each of 26 classes. How many tennis balls are ordered altogether?
A baker bakes 145 bread rolls each day. How many bread rolls are baked in 32 days?
A factory produces 126 toys per day. How many toys does it produce in 18 days?
A car park has 67 spaces on each floor. If it has 38 floors, how many spaces are there in total?
Each carton holds 218 millilitres of orange juice. How many millilitres are in 25 cartons?
A book has 78 pages. Each page has 35 lines. How many lines are in the book?
A library receives 156 new books each month. How many new books arrive over 42 months?
A sports club has 93 members, and each member pays £47 for a kit. What is the total cost of all the kits?
A train ticket costs £54. How much do 29 tickets cost?
A printing press prints 284 posters per hour. How many posters are printed in 36 hours?
A farmer collects 127 eggs each day. How many eggs does he collect in 48 days?
A café sells 86 cups of coffee per day. How many cups do they sell in 52 days?
A school tuck shop sells 315 snacks per week. How many snacks are sold over 28 weeks?
A charity walk has 176 walkers, and each walker raises £35. How much money is raised altogether?
A warehouse ships 247 packages per day. How many packages are shipped in 24 days?
A warehouse ships 408 parcels each day. How many parcels are shipped in 37 days?
A craft club needs 34 beads for each necklace. How many beads are needed to make 18 necklaces?
A swimming pool sells 52 tickets each session. How many tickets are sold over 29 sessions?
A school orders 87 exercise books for each of 23 classes. How many exercise books are ordered in total?
A coach can carry 115 passengers. How many passengers can 34 coaches carry altogether?
A shop sells 64 items per day. How many items does it sell in 41 days?
A beekeeper harvests 138 grams of honey from each hive. How many grams does she harvest from 26 hives?
A cake stall sells 76 cupcakes each day at a fair. How many cupcakes are sold over 37 days?
A delivery van carries 195 packages on each trip. How many packages are delivered in 22 trips?
A pet shop has 49 fish tanks, each containing 58 fish. How many fish are there in total?
A music shop sells 217 guitar picks per week. How many guitar picks are sold in 31 weeks?
A hotel has 83 rooms. Each room costs £46 per night. What is the total revenue for one night?
A football stadium sells 164 hot dogs at each match. How many hot dogs are sold over 45 matches?

A tile shop sells 258 tiles per day. How many tiles are sold in 39 days?
A biscuit factory packs 72 biscuits into each tin. How many biscuits are in 68 tins?
A factory makes 186 products per day. How many products does it make in 33 days?
A newsagent sells 143 newspapers each week. How many newspapers are sold in 52 weeks?
A fruit picker fills 95 punnets of strawberries each day. How many punnets are filled in 63 days?
A scout group collects 279 items for a food bank each month. How many items are collected in 28 months?
A toy shop sells 56 building sets per week. How many are sold over 74 weeks?
A bakery produces 208 loaves per day. How many loaves does it produce in 46 days?
A zoo feeds 174 grams of food to each penguin daily. How many grams are needed for 35 penguins?
A chocolate factory makes 88 bars every hour. How many bars are made in 49 hours?
A school canteen serves 326 lunches each day. How many lunches are served in 27 days?
Each class in a school has 69 reading books. If there are 82 classes, how many reading books are there altogether?
A shop sells 119 magazines per week. How many magazines does it sell in 38 weeks?
A bike hire company has 197 bikes at each of 43 stations. How many bikes does it have in total?
A garden centre sells 84 packets of seeds each week. How many packets are sold in 57 weeks?
A water bottling plant fills 345 bottles per minute. How many bottles are filled in 29 minutes?
An ice cream van sells 73 ice creams at each event. How many ice creams are sold over 91 events?
A gym has 226 members. Each member pays £64 per month. What is the monthly revenue?
A supermarket stocks 159 tins of soup on each shelf. How many tins are on 36 shelves?

A bookshop sells 65 copies of a popular book each week. How many copies are sold in 78 weeks?
A company employs 154 workers. Each worker earns £42 per day. What is the daily wage bill?
A post office handles 213 letters each hour. How many letters are handled in 51 hours?
A stationery shop sells 79 pens per day. How many pens are sold over 85 days?
A bottled water company fills 418 bottles per batch. How many bottles are filled in 32 batches?
A florist arranges 68 bouquets each week. How many bouquets are arranged in 93 weeks?

A sandwich shop makes 96 sandwiches each day. How many sandwiches are made in 72 days?

An airport handles 597 passengers each hour. How many passengers pass through in 24 hours?
A wildlife reserve has 63 enclosures, each with 94 animals. How many animals are in the reserve?
A cinema has 284 seats. Tickets cost £49 each. What is the revenue if all seats are sold?
A crisp factory packs 193 bags per hour. How many bags are packed in 62 hours?

A newspaper prints 814 copies per edition. How many copies are printed over 27 editions?

A magazine has 197 pages in each issue. How many pages are in 52 issues?
A gymnastics team scores 82 points per routine. How many points are scored in 96 routines?
A drinks machine dispenses 976 cups per day. How many cups are dispensed in 25 days?
A train has 74 seats in each carriage. How many seats are in 88 carriages?
A stadium has 738 rows. Each row has 63 seats. How many seats in total?
A sports shop sells 209 footballs each month. How many footballs are sold in 46 months?
A holiday park has 93 caravans, and each caravan uses 77 litres of water per day. How many litres are used in total each day?
A juice company produces 847 bottles per hour. How many bottles are produced in 36 hours?

A pizza restaurant uses 88 grams of cheese on each pizza. How many grams are used for 62 pizzas?

A greenhouse grows 69 tomato plants in each row. How many plants are in 85 rows?
A packet of crisps has 24 crisps inside. How many crisps are in 3 packets?
There are 15 marbles in each bag. How many marbles are in 12 bags?
A pack of colouring pencils costs £4. How much do 13 packs cost?
A minibus has 36 seats. How many seats are on 5 minibuses?
Each shelf holds 11 books. How many books are on 14 shelves?
A car journey to school takes 20 minutes each way. How many minutes are spent travelling over 18 one-way trips?
A baker makes 43 scones each morning. How many scones does he make in 7 mornings?
A bag of apples costs £3. How much do 25 bags cost?
A crayon box holds 16 crayons. How many crayons are in 11 boxes?
There are 12 eggs in a box. How many eggs are in 8 boxes?
A netball team scores 32 goals each match. How many goals do they score in 9 matches?
A football sticker costs 6p. How much do 45 stickers cost?
There are 25 stickers on each sheet. How many stickers are on 16 sheets?
Each table seats 6 children. How many children can sit at 19 tables?
A garden has 14 sunflowers in each row. How many sunflowers are in 13 rows?
A pencil costs 8p. How much do 35 pencils cost?
A box of chalk contains 50 sticks. How many sticks of chalk are in 9 boxes?
Each row in a classroom has 7 desks. There are 12 rows. How many desks are there?
Estimate the answer to 29 × 11 by rounding both numbers to the nearest 10.
Estimate the answer to 48 × 21 by rounding both numbers to the nearest 10.

Work out 365 × 28 by partitioning: (365 × 20) + (365 × 8).
Partition and calculate: 437 × 15 = (437 × 10) + (437 × 5).
